tools.name: list_calculators
tools.description: List available calculators, optionally filtered by category

tools.name: get_calculator_schema
tools.description: Get the input schema for a specific calculator

tools.name: calculate
tools.description: Run a calculation and get results + prefilled URL

tools.name: generate_prefilled_url
tools.description: Generate a prefilled URL without running calculation

tools.name: calculate_cas
tools.description: Evaluate one or more headless CAS expressions server-side (MCP-only numeric mode). Unsupported expressions return a GUI handoff link.

tools.name: calculate_cas_headless
tools.description: Alias of calculate_cas. Headless MCP-only CAS evaluator; if unsupported features are requested, returns GUI handoff details.

tools.name: create_session
tools.description: Create a new interactive session for any calculator and return the session URL

tools.name: get_session_state
tools.description: Retrieve the current field values, computation transcript, and pending message queue for an active session

tools.name: push_session_action
tools.description: Push actions into a session's message queue (set fields, submit computation, trigger plot, etc.)

tools.name: close_session
tools.description: Close a session and optionally persist a snapshot of its final state

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: calculate, get_session_state · Public sink: push_session_action · Destructive: calculate.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: calculate, get_session_state · Public sink: push_session_action · Destructive: calculate

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
